an1.21:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when undeveloped, is as unpliant as the mind.
an1.21:1.2: The mind, when undeveloped, is unpliant.”
an1.22:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when developed, is as pliant as the mind.
an1.22:1.2: The mind, when developed, is pliant.”
an1.23:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when undeveloped, leads to such great harm as the mind.
an1.23:1.2: The mind, when undeveloped, leads to great harm.”
an1.24:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when developed, leads to such great benefit as the mind.
an1.24:1.2: The mind, when developed, leads to great benefit.”
an1.25:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when undeveloped & unapparent, leads to such great harm as the mind.
an1.25:1.2: The mind, when undeveloped & unapparent, leads to great harm.”
an1.26:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when developed & apparent, leads to such great benefit as the mind.
an1.26:1.2: The mind, when developed & apparent, leads to great benefit.”
an1.27:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when undeveloped & uncultivated, leads to such great harm as the mind.
an1.27:1.2: The mind, when undeveloped & uncultivated, leads to great harm.”
an1.28:1.1: “I don’t envision a single thing that, when developed & cultivated, leads to such great benefit as the mind.
